rationale.R1.6: "Clean this up" is canonically a writing-polish delegation: sentence clarity, concision, word choice, paragraph cohesion, and flow are the load-bearing expected outputs. Failure to improve prose quality invalidates the delegation.
rationale.R1.5: Peripheral only — minor paragraph-level reordering may fall naturally inside a polish pass, but the delegation does not request structural reorganization; kept at boundary weight 0.3, below active-set threshold.
rationale.R1.7: Peripheral only — citations must be preserved accurately during any polish pass as a non-regression constraint, but the delegation does not ask for citation review or coverage expansion; kept at boundary weight 0.3.
